历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9467 → 12367 → 11280 → 13524 → 12662, showing an overall backward trend with significant fluctuations in recent three years. The 2025 baseline is about 12662. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 81 in 2020 and 2021, 82 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 79 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 75, a decrease of 4 from 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment and a slight easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 54th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48 and 55, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 98th, with average reviews. No significant enrollment gaps or breaks have been observed. Overall attention is stable, with no major positive or negative signals. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), and Mechanical Engineering (A-) are all traditional strong engineering disciplines, closely related to enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation, providing stable appeal to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were all highly recommended or recommended in 2024, benefiting science and engineering universities. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Liaoning is about 143,600, essentially unchanged from 2025, with minimal fluctuation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 12662, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (slightly easier competition), stable examinee numbers, continued favorable popularity for science and engineering majors, and somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly forward (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12248, with a range of 11748 to 12748.
